response: text <<Emily visits the yoga studio 4 times a week>> <<She spends 1.5 hours each day practicing yoga poses>> <<She also spends a quarter of her yoga practice time meditating and doing breathing exercises each day>> <<How many hours does she spend at the yoga studio a week?>> <<The total time she spends at the studio is 4 times 1.5 hours, which is 6 hours. She also spends a quarter of that time, which is 1.5 hours, on meditation and breathing. So the total time she spends at the studio is 6 + 1.5 = 7.5 hours.<<The shop is located at the studio and offers various classes and equipment.>> <<The shop is a must-visit for those interested in yoga and wellness.>>
